name: East of Tent
description: A narrow clearing east of the tent. Thorny bushes crowd the edges, but a gap in the undergrowth to the east reveals a faint trail heading into the forest.
ambient: Birds chatter somewhere in the distance.
A few scattered feathers lie on the ground.
Thorns catch the light, sharp and glistening.

interaction_rules.text: The feather is soft, barred brown and grey—a hawk's primary, shed recently.
You try to pluck a thorn. It pricks your finger, drawing a tiny bead of blood.
